preview.summary: Group L underdogs Panama host title contenders England in a rematch of their 2018 World Cup meeting. Panama's compact, hard-running side will look to frustrate a Tuchel team rich in attacking talent.
preview.homeForm: Panama, ranked 33rd, qualified unbeaten from CONCACAF and enter as the group's lowest-ranked side.
preview.awayForm: England, ranked 4th, were the first European side to qualify but drew boos for patchy recent friendly form.
preview.homeKey: Jose Fajardo: joint top scorer in Panama's qualifying campaign.
preview.awayKey: Harry Kane: prolific captain at his third World Cup.
storylines: Rematch of England's 6-1 win over Panama in 2018
Kane returns to face the side he scored a hat-trick against
Panama's unbeaten qualifiers test England's favourites tag
preview.h2h: Their only meeting was at the 2018 World Cup, a 6-1 England win featuring a Kane hat-trick.
